notes: Runs and plays perfectly, but doesn't detect Steam Controller using Steam's driver, which it did on Win7Th---that's not issue enough not to rate it Platinum.  (I didn't test it with X360 controller).   Works perfectly with Kozek's SC-Controller though.
title: Blood Waves

notes: Runs and plays perfectly.  Detects partial Steam Controller input via Steam---Kozec's sc-controller works perfectly.
title: Blood Waves

notes: Everything but controller detection is superb!  Using SC-Controller with the Steam Controller gets around that problem.
